MINI MINUTES: JPT Andy Westley; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ryan Siu is present.
Attorney Howard Chung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Richard Kouma is present.
Attorney Jacqueline Tam appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAR-17-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
